testcase.name: test_dj_brain_includes_ghost_counter

failure.message: AssertionError: ghost_counter key missing from dj-brain response. keys=['target_date', 'mode', 'seed_mains', 'seed_stars', 'envelope', 'frequency', 'star_history', 'precedent', 'hungry', 'family_tablet', 'sneaky_cousins', 'qd_cell', 'law_90', 'law_89', 'saturation_47', 'ranked_suspects', 'ranked_stars'] assert 'ghost_counter' in {'envelope': {'date': '05.05.2026', 'date_sum_dj': 56, 'day': 5, 'day_plus_month': 10, ...}, 'family_tablet': {'deepest_starved_family': 7, 'deepest_starved_members': [7, 17, 37], 'families': {'0': [20, 50], '1': [21, 31], '2': [12, 32], '3': [43], ...}}, 'frequency': {'candidates': [{'decode': '432 × 4/3 (perfect 4th) = 576', 'freq': 576, 'interval': 'perfect 4th', 'ratio': '4/3', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 3/2 (perfect 5th) = 648', 'freq': 648, 'interval': 'perfect 5th', 'ratio': '3/2', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 2/1 (octave up) = 864', 'freq': 864, 'interval': 'octave up', 'ratio': '2/1', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 5/4 (major 3rd) = 540', 'freq': 540, 'interval': 'major 3rd', 'ratio': '5/4', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 5/3 (major 6th) = 720', 'freq': 720, 'interval': 'major 6th', 'ratio': '5/3', ...}], 'date': '05.05.2026', 'harmonic_divisors': {'12': 48, '16': 36, '18': 32, '24': 24}, 'is_void': True, ...}, 'hungry': {'hungry_mains': [6, 7, 12, 15, 17, 18, ...], 'hungry_mains_count': 18, 'hungry_stars': [], 'last_seed_dates': ['01.05.2026', '28.04.2026', '24.04.2026', '21.04.2026', '17.04.2026', '14.04.2026', ...], ...}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_session33_ghost_counter.py:96: in test_dj_brain_includes_ghost_counter assert "ghost_counter" in d, ( E AssertionError: ghost_counter key missing from dj-brain response. keys=['target_date', 'mode', 'seed_mains', 'seed_stars', 'envelope', 'frequency', 'star_history', 'precedent', 'hungry', 'family_tablet', 'sneaky_cousins', 'qd_cell', 'law_90', 'law_89', 'saturation_47', 'ranked_suspects', 'ranked_stars'] E assert 'ghost_counter' in {'envelope': {'date': '05.05.2026', 'date_sum_dj': 56, 'day': 5, 'day_plus_month': 10, ...}, 'family_tablet': {'deepest_starved_family': 7, 'deepest_starved_members': [7, 17, 37], 'families': {'0': [20, 50], '1': [21, 31], '2': [12, 32], '3': [43], ...}}, 'frequency': {'candidates': [{'decode': '432 × 4/3 (perfect 4th) = 576', 'freq': 576, 'interval': 'perfect 4th', 'ratio': '4/3', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 3/2 (perfect 5th) = 648', 'freq': 648, 'interval': 'perfect 5th', 'ratio': '3/2', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 2/1 (octave up) = 864', 'freq': 864, 'interval': 'octave up', 'ratio': '2/1', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 5/4 (major 3rd) = 540', 'freq': 540, 'interval': 'major 3rd', 'ratio': '5/4', ...}, {'decode': '432 × 5/3 (major 6th) = 720', 'freq': 720, 'interval': 'major 6th', 'ratio': '5/3', ...}], 'date': '05.05.2026', 'harmonic_divisors': {'12': 48, '16': 36, '18': 32, '24': 24}, 'is_void': True, ...}, 'hungry': {'hungry_mains': [6, 7, 12, 15, 17, 18, ...], 'hungry_mains_count': 18, 'hungry_stars': [], 'last_seed_dates': ['01.05.2026', '28.04.2026', '24.04.2026', '21.04.2026', '17.04.2026', '14.04.2026', ...], ...}, ...}
